name: martix-typescript

publisher.name: MartiXDev
publisher.distributionModel: standalone skill with direct Copilot marketplace registration

summary: Type-first TypeScript 7 authoring, migration, debugging, and review with explicit TypeScript 6 compiler-API compatibility guidance.

contextStrategy: Open only the routed rule or reference for the current TypeScript concern.
Use AGENTS.md for cross-branch work and companion-skill handoffs.

companionSkills.name: martix-sharepoint-spfx
companionSkills.handoffWhen: SPFx, React, Teams, Viva, deployment, or SharePoint-specific APIs own the decision.

relationships.handoffPolicy: Stay in martix-typescript for cross-cutting language and compiler concerns; open a companion skill when framework, runner, linter, bundler, or publishing behavior owns the narrower decision.
